mapper.sql: id, user_id, company_name, credit_code, legal_person, registered_capital, building_no, rent_area, industry, introduction, contact_person, contact_phone, license_url, status, audit_opinion, auditor_id, audit_time, lease_start_date, lease_end_date, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_enterprise ( user_id, company_name, credit_code, legal_person, registered_capital, building_no, rent_area, industry, introduction, contact_person, contact_phone, license_url, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{companyName}, #{creditCode}, #{legalPerson}, #{registeredCapital}, #{buildingNo}, #{rentArea}, #{industry}, #{introduction}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{licenseUrl}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_enterprise SET status = #{status}, audit_opinion = #{auditOpinion}, auditor_id = #{auditorId}, audit_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE biz_enterprise
company_name = #{companyName}, credit_code = #{creditCode}, legal_person = #{legalPerson}, registered_capital = #{registeredCapital}, building_no = #{buildingNo}, rent_area = #{rentArea}, industry = #{industry},
introduction = #{introduction},
contact_person = #{contactPerson}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, license_url = #{licenseUrl}, lease_start_date = #{leaseStartDate}, lease_end_date = #{leaseEndDate},
status = #{status}, audit_opinion = #{auditOpinion}, auditor_id = #{auditorId}, audit_time = #{auditTime},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT e.*, u.real_name AS applicant_name, au.real_name AS auditor_name FROM biz_enterprise e LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user au ON e.auditor_id = au.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_enterprise WHERE status = 0 OR status = 4
